descFull: Plugin suite + bundled MCP servers for Claude Code. Full delivery lifecycle: Agile pipeline with multi-model AI review, project bootstrap, documentation generation, codebase audits, performance optimization, community workflows. Includes hex-line (hash-verified editing), hex-graph (code knowledge graph), and hex-ssh (remote SSH) MCP servers.
